title: DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority Ujjain (DLSA Ujjain)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority Ujjain (DLSA Ujjain) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website ujjain.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid 4-wheeler Driving License, Experience in driving 4-wheeler vehicle
qualification.details: Minimum 10th pass from a recognized institution. Valid four-wheeler driving license. Experience of driving a four-wheeler vehicle.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Ujjain Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ujjain.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Ujjain Contract Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Contract Vehicle Driver post is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is passing the 10th grade from a recognized board or institution. Additionally, candidates must possess a valid four-wheeler driving license.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Contract Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for this post is 18 years. The maximum age limit has not been specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Contract Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 13,000 per month for the Contract Vehicle Driver position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DLSA Ujjain Contract Vehicle Driver job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Practical Driving Test to assess the candidates' suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DLSA Ujjain Contract Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Ujjain, which is https://ujjain.dcourts.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Contract Vehicle Driver position is on a contract basis.
